'''âv-y-t''' ('''kavayat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bean|bean]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-y-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bean|bean]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-y-t
|-
! Lemma
| kavayat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivayat|thivayat]] || [[word:jivayat|jivayat]] || [[word:shivayat|shivayat]] || [[word:kivayat|kivayat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvayat|thuthuvayat]] || [[word:jujuvayat|jujuvayat]] || [[word:shushuvayat|shushuvayat]] || [[word:kukuvayat|kukuvayat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvayat|thuvayat]] || [[word:juvayat|juvayat]] || [[word:shuvayat|shuvayat]] || [[word:kuvayat|kuvayat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvayat|thuvayat]] || [[word:juvayat|juvayat]] || [[word:shuvayat|shuvayat]] || [[word:kuvayat|kuvayat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevayat|thevayat]] || [[word:jevayat|jevayat]] || [[word:shevayat|shevayat]] || [[word:kevayat|kevayat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovayat|thothovayat]] || [[word:jojovayat|jojovayat]] || [[word:shoshovayat|shoshovayat]] || [[word:kokovayat|kokovayat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovayat|thovayat]] || [[word:jovayat|jovayat]] || [[word:shovayat|shovayat]] || [[word:kovayat|kovayat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovayat|thovayat]] || [[word:jovayat|jovayat]] || [[word:shovayat|shovayat]] || [[word:kovayat|kovayat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvayat|thĂŠvayat]] || [[word:jĂŠvayat|jĂŠvayat]] || [[word:shĂŠvayat|shĂŠvayat]] || [[word:kĂŠvayat|kĂŠvayat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavayat|thathavayat]] || [[word:jajavayat|jajavayat]] || [[word:shashavayat|shashavayat]] || [[word:kakavayat|kakavayat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavayat|thavayat]] || [[word:javayat|javayat]] || [[word:shavayat|shavayat]] || [[word:kavayat|kavayat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavayat|thavayat]] || [[word:javayat|javayat]] || [[word:shavayat|shavayat]] || [[word:kavayat|kavayat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavayat|shavayat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavayat|goshavayat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavayat|gokishavayat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavayatnĂŒ|shavayatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavayatnknĂŒ|goshavayatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavayatnĂŒ|gokishavayatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavayatshĂ«|shavayatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavayatnkshĂ«|goshavayatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavayatshĂ«|gokishavayatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavayatro|shavayatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavayatnkro|goshavayatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavayatro|gokishavayatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavayatmu|shavayatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavayatnkmu|goshavayatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavayatmu|gokishavayatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavayatsher|shavayatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavayatnksher|goshavayatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavayatsher|gokishavayatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavayatng|shavayatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavayatnkng|goshavayatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavayatng|gokishavayatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavayatya|shavayatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavayatnkya|goshavayatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavayatya|gokishavayatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavayatyam|shavayatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavayatnkyam|goshavayatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavayatyam|gokishavayatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavayatnĂŒshĂ«|shavayatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavayatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavayatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavayatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavayatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavayatnĂŒro|shavayatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavayatnknĂŒro|goshavayatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavayatnĂŒro|gokishavayatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavayatnĂŒmu|shavayatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavayatnknĂŒmu|goshavayatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavayatnĂŒmu|gokishavayatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavayatshĂ«nĂŒ|shavayatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavayatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavayatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavayatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavayatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavayatshĂ«ro|shavayatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavayatnkshĂ«ro|goshavayatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavayatshĂ«ro|gokishavayatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavayatshĂ«mu|shavayatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavayatnkshĂ«mu|goshavayatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavayatshĂ«mu|gokishavayatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavayatronĂŒ|shavayatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavayatnkronĂŒ|goshavayatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavayatronĂŒ|gokishavayatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavayatroshĂ«|shavayatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavayatnkroshĂ«|goshavayatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavayatroshĂ«|gokishavayatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavayatromu|shavayatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavayatnkromu|goshavayatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavayatromu|gokishavayatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavayatmunĂŒ|shavayatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavayatnkmunĂŒ|goshavayatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavayatmunĂŒ|gokishavayatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavayatmushĂ«|shavayatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavayatnkmushĂ«|goshavayatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavayatmushĂ«|gokishavayatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavayatmuro|shavayatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavayatnkmuro|goshavayatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavayatmuro|gokishavayatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
